appearance_and_shape.query: appearance, silhouette, visible form factor, shape, design, look
appearance_and_shape.snippet: Illuminate your favorite reading nook with this USB Ports Desk Lamp from Threshold™. Boasting an oval glass shade with a wooden base, this lamp adds a touch of natural appeal to your home decor while illuminating your space with just the right amount of light. The non-removable integrated LED bulb creates a soft glow, while the full-range dimmable setting allows you to create the perfect ambiance. Place it on the side table next to your sofa or on a console table in your living room for an inviting look, and use the two USB ports to charge your devices. Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

color_and_finish.query: color, finish, gloss, matte, black, white, metallic, wood tone
color_and_finish.snippet:
Good lamp but wish it's warmer light
Good function and pretty small size lamp. I wish the color of the light was more on the warm side. Going to try it out as part of newborn’s middle of the night chang up set up. However, majority suggests using red light or warm light so I am hesitant to say this is a good option for this set up.
